title: Time-LLM: Time Series Forecasting by Reprogramming Large Language Models
summary: Time-LLM is a novel framework that reprograms large language models (LLMs) for time series forecasting. By designing a prompt-based approach, Time-LLM achieves state-of-the-art performance on multiple forecasting benchmarks.
details: 本文提出了一种新颖的Time-LLM框架，通过重新编程大型语言模型来进行时间序列预测。通过设计基于提示的方法，Time-LLM在多个预测基准上实现了SOTA性能。
motivation: 传统时间序列预测模型难以利用大规模预训练语言模型的知识
method: 设计提示模板将时间序列数据转换为LLM可理解的格式
result: 在多个基准数据集上超越现有方法
conclusion: LLM在时间序列预测领域具有巨大潜力

code_info.description: Time-LLM: Time Series Forecasting by Reprogramming Large Language Models

title: PatchTST: A Time Series is Worth 64 Words: Long-term Forecasting with Transformers
summary: We propose PatchTST, a transformer-based model for long-term time series forecasting. By patching time series into segments and applying channel-independent attention, PatchTST achieves superior performance on multiple benchmarks.
details: 本文提出了PatchTST，一种基于Transformer的长期时间序列预测模型。通过将时间序列分割成片段并应用通道独立注意力，PatchTST在多个基准上实现了卓越性能。
motivation: 传统Transformer在长时间序列预测中计算复杂度高
method: 将时间序列patch化，使用通道独立注意力机制
result: 在ETT、Weather等数据集上达到SOTA
conclusion: Patch化策略有效提升Transformer在时间序列预测中的性能

code_info.description: PatchTST: A Time Series is Worth 64 Words

title: iTransformer: Inverting Transformers for Multivariate Time Series Forecasting
summary: iTransformer inverts the dimensions of input time series and applies attention on variables instead of time steps. This simple yet effective design achieves state-of-the-art performance on multivariate forecasting tasks.
details: iTransformer通过反转输入时间序列的维度并对变量而非时间步应用注意力。这种简单而有效的设计在多变量预测任务上实现了SOTA性能。
motivation: 传统Transformer对时间步建模难以捕捉变量间关系
method: 反转维度，对变量进行注意力建模
result: 在多变量预测任务上显著优于基线方法
conclusion: 维度反转是提升Transformer预测能力的有效策略

code_info.description: iTransformer for Multivariate Time Series Forecasting

title: Vision Transformer with Deformable Attention for Object Detection
summary: We propose Deformable DETR, a novel object detection framework that combines Vision Transformers with deformable attention mechanisms. Our method achieves state-of-the-art performance on COCO benchmark.
details: 本文提出了Deformable DETR，一种结合Vision Transformer和可变形注意力机制的新型目标检测框架。我们的方法在COCO基准上实现了SOTA性能。
motivation: DETR收敛慢且小目标检测性能差
method: 引入可变形注意力机制，聚焦关键区域
result: 在COCO上达到52.1 AP，训练速度提升10倍
conclusion: 可变形注意力有效提升Transformer检测性能

title: Electricity Load Forecasting using Graph Neural Networks with Temporal Attention
summary: We propose a novel graph neural network architecture with temporal attention for electricity load forecasting. Our model captures both spatial dependencies between power grid nodes and temporal patterns, achieving superior performance on real-world datasets.
details: 本文提出了一种结合时间注意力的图神经网络架构用于电力负荷预测。我们的模型捕捉电网节点间的空间依赖和时间模式，在真实数据集上实现了卓越性能。
motivation: 传统方法难以同时建模电网空间结构和时间动态
method: 图神经网络 + 时间注意力机制
result: 在多个真实电网数据集上误差降低15%
conclusion: GNN+注意力是电力预测的有效方向

title: Diffusion Models for Time Series Generation and Forecasting
summary: We explore diffusion models for time series generation and forecasting. By adapting denoising diffusion probabilistic models to sequential data, we achieve state-of-the-art results on multiple forecasting benchmarks.
details: 我们探索了扩散模型在时间序列生成和预测中的应用。通过调整去噪扩散概率模型到序列数据，我们在多个预测基准上实现了SOTA结果。
motivation: 扩散模型在图像生成中表现优异，但在时间序列中应用有限
method: 将DDPM适配到时间序列数据
result: 在多个基准上超越GAN和VAE方法
conclusion: 扩散模型为时间序列预测提供了新范式

title: Swin Transformer V2: Scaling Up Capacity and Resolution
summary: Swin Transformer V2 scales up the capacity and resolution of vision transformers. With post-norm architecture and scaled cosine attention, we achieve state-of-the-art performance on multiple vision benchmarks.
details: Swin Transformer V2扩展了视觉Transformer的容量和分辨率。通过后归一化架构和缩放余弦注意力，我们在多个视觉基准上实现了SOTA性能。
motivation: 原始Swin Transformer在高分辨率输入时训练不稳定
method: 后归一化 + 缩放余弦注意力
result: 在ImageNet、COCO等基准上刷新记录
conclusion: 架构改进使Transformer能够扩展到更大规模

title: Solar Power Forecasting with Ensemble Deep Learning Models
summary: We propose an ensemble deep learning framework for solar power forecasting. By combining CNN, LSTM, and attention mechanisms, our model achieves superior accuracy in predicting solar energy generation.
details: 我们提出了一个用于太阳能预测的集成深度学习框架。通过结合CNN、LSTM和注意力机制，我们的模型在预测太阳能发电方面实现了卓越的准确性。
motivation: 单一模型难以捕捉太阳能发电的复杂模式
method: CNN+LSTM+注意力的集成模型
result: 预测误差比基线降低20%
conclusion: 集成学习是提升太阳能预测精度的有效方法

code_info.description: Solar Power Forecasting with Deep Learning

title: DINOv2: Learning Robust Visual Features without Supervision
summary: DINOv2 learns robust visual features through self-supervised learning at scale. The pretrained models achieve state-of-the-art performance on various downstream tasks without fine-tuning.
details: DINOv2通过大规模自监督学习学习鲁棒的视觉特征。预训练模型在各种下游任务上无需微调即可实现SOTA性能。
motivation: 自监督学习可以替代大规模标注数据
method: 知识蒸馏 + 自监督预训练
result: 在分类、检测、分割任务上表现优异
conclusion: 自监督预训练是获取通用视觉特征的有效途径

title: Wind Power Prediction using Spatiotemporal Graph Convolutional Networks
summary: We propose a spatiotemporal graph convolutional network for wind power prediction. By modeling spatial correlations between wind farms and temporal dynamics, our method achieves superior forecasting accuracy.
details: 我们提出了一种用于风电预测的时空图卷积网络。通过建模风电场间的空间相关性和时间动态，我们的方法实现了卓越的预测精度。
motivation: 风电预测需要考虑空间相关性和时间动态
method: 时空图卷积网络
result: 在真实风电数据集上误差降低18%
conclusion: STGCN是风电预测的有效方法

title: Segment Anything Model (SAM)
summary: SAM is a promptable foundation model for image segmentation. Trained on 1 billion masks, SAM achieves zero-shot generalization to new tasks and domains, setting a new state-of-the-art benchmark.
details: SAM是一个可提示的图像分割基础模型。在10亿个掩码上训练，SAM实现了对新任务和领域的零样本泛化，建立了新的SOTA基准。
motivation: 通用图像分割模型需要大规模数据和提示机制
method: 大规模数据训练 + 提示学习
result: 零样本泛化到多种分割任务
conclusion: 基础模型范式可成功应用于分割任务

title: Energy Demand Forecasting with Multi-Scale Temporal Convolutional Networks
summary: We propose a multi-scale temporal convolutional network for energy demand forecasting. By capturing patterns at multiple time scales, our model achieves superior performance on real-world energy datasets.
details: 我们提出了一种用于能源需求预测的多尺度时间卷积网络。通过捕捉多个时间尺度的模式，我们的模型在真实能源数据集上实现了卓越性能。
motivation: 能源需求具有多尺度时间模式
method: 多尺度时间卷积网络
result: 在多个能源数据集上误差降低12%
conclusion: 多尺度建模是能源预测的关键

title: Stable Diffusion 3: Scaling Rectified Flow Transformers
summary: Stable Diffusion 3 scales up rectified flow transformers for high-quality image generation. Our model achieves state-of-the-art results on multiple generation benchmarks with improved text alignment.
details: Stable Diffusion 3扩展了整流流Transformer用于高质量图像生成。我们的模型在多个生成基准上实现了SOTA结果，并改善了文本对齐。
motivation: 现有扩散模型在文本对齐和图像质量上仍有不足
method: 整流流Transformer + 大规模训练
result: 在多个生成基准上刷新记录
conclusion: 整流流是扩散模型的有效改进方向

title: Grid Load Balancing using Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning
summary: We propose a multi-agent reinforcement learning framework for grid load balancing. By coordinating multiple agents across the power grid, our method achieves superior load distribution and reduces energy waste.
details: 我们提出了一个用于电网负载均衡的多智能体强化学习框架。通过协调电网中的多个智能体，我们的方法实现了卓越的负载分配并减少能源浪费。
motivation: 传统负载均衡方法难以应对动态电网环境
method: 多智能体强化学习
result: 负载分布均匀性提升25%，能源浪费减少15%
conclusion: MARL是智能电网管理的有效方法

title: CLIP: Learning Transferable Visual Models from Natural Language Supervision
summary: CLIP learns visual concepts from natural language supervision. By training on 400 million image-text pairs, CLIP achieves zero-shot transfer to ImageNet and other benchmarks, setting new state-of-the-art records.
details: CLIP从自然语言监督中学习视觉概念。通过在4亿图像-文本对上训练，CLIP实现了对ImageNet和其他基准的零样本迁移，创造了新的SOTA记录。
motivation: 视觉模型需要大规模标注数据
method: 对比学习 + 大规模图像-文本对训练
result: 零样本ImageNet分类达到76.8%准确率
conclusion: 语言监督是学习视觉表征的有效途径

title: Renewable Energy Integration Forecasting with Hybrid Deep Learning
summary: We propose a hybrid deep learning model for renewable energy integration forecasting. By combining weather data with historical energy patterns, our model achieves superior accuracy in predicting renewable energy output.
details: 我们提出了一个用于可再生能源集成预测的混合深度学习模型。通过结合天气数据和历史能源模式，我们的模型在预测可再生能源输出方面实现了卓越的准确性。
motivation: 可再生能源预测需要考虑天气因素
method: 混合深度学习 + 天气数据融合
result: 预测误差比单一模型降低22%
conclusion: 多模态数据融合提升可再生能源预测精度

code_info.description: Renewable Energy Forecasting with Hybrid DL

title: MAE: Masked Autoencoders Are Scalable Vision Learners
summary: MAE demonstrates that masked autoencoders are scalable vision learners. By masking 75% of input patches and reconstructing them, MAE achieves state-of-the-art transfer performance on multiple vision benchmarks.
details: MAE证明了掩码自编码器是可扩展的视觉学习器。通过掩码75%的输入块并重建它们，MAE在多个视觉基准上实现了SOTA迁移性能。
motivation: 自监督学习需要高效的预训练方法
method: 掩码自编码 + 非对称编码器-解码器
result: 在ImageNet分类、检测、分割上表现优异
conclusion: 掩码自编码是有效的视觉预训练方法

code_info.description: Masked Autoencoders Are Scalable Vision Learners

title: Smart Grid Anomaly Detection with Graph Attention Networks
summary: We propose a graph attention network for smart grid anomaly detection. By modeling the power grid as a graph and applying attention mechanisms, our method achieves superior detection accuracy for grid anomalies.
details: 我们提出了一种用于智能电网异常检测的图注意力网络。通过将电网建模为图并应用注意力机制，我们的方法在电网异常检测方面实现了卓越的准确性。
motivation: 传统异常检测方法难以捕捉电网拓扑关系
method: 图注意力网络 + 异常检测
result: 异常检测准确率达到98.5%，误报率降低30%
conclusion: GAT是智能电网异常检测的有效方法

code_info.description: Smart Grid Anomaly Detection with GAT

title: ViT: An Image is Worth 16x16 Words: Transformers for Image Recognition at Scale
summary: ViT applies pure transformers to image recognition. By splitting images into patches and treating them as tokens, ViT achieves state-of-the-art performance on ImageNet when pretrained on large datasets.
details: ViT将纯Transformer应用于图像识别。通过将图像分割成块并将其视为token，ViT在大规模数据集预训练后在ImageNet上实现了SOTA性能。
motivation: CNN在视觉任务中占主导，Transformer潜力未被充分挖掘
method: 图像patch化 + Transformer编码
result: 在ImageNet上达到88.55%准确率
conclusion: Transformer可以成为视觉任务的基础架构

title: Electricity Price Forecasting with Transformer and Market Features
summary: We propose a transformer-based model for electricity price forecasting. By incorporating market features and temporal patterns, our model achieves superior accuracy in predicting electricity prices across multiple markets.
details: 我们提出了一个基于Transformer的电价预测模型。通过结合市场特征和时间模式，我们的模型在预测多个市场的电价方面实现了卓越的准确性。
motivation: 电价预测需要考虑市场因素和时间动态
method: Transformer + 市场特征融合
result: 在多个电力市场数据集上误差降低17%
conclusion: 市场特征融合提升电价预测精度

title: BEiT: BERT Pre-Training of Image Transformers
summary: BEiT adapts BERT-style pre-training to image transformers. By predicting discrete visual tokens, BEiT achieves state-of-the-art transfer performance on various vision benchmarks.
details: BEiT将BERT风格的预训练适配到图像Transformer。通过预测离散视觉token，BEI在各种视觉基准上实现了SOTA迁移性能。
motivation: BERT的成功启发了视觉预训练的新方向
method: 离散视觉token预测 + Transformer
result: 在ImageNet、ADE20K等基准上表现优异
conclusion: BERT风格预训练可成功应用于视觉

code_info.description: BEiT: BERT Pre-Training of Image Transformers

title: Demand Response Optimization with Deep Reinforcement Learning
summary: We propose a deep reinforcement learning framework for demand response optimization. By learning optimal pricing strategies, our method achieves superior energy efficiency and cost reduction.
details: 我们提出了一个用于需求响应优化的深度强化学习框架。通过学习最优定价策略，我们的方法实现了卓越的能源效率和成本降低。
motivation: 传统需求响应方法难以应对动态市场环境
method: 深度强化学习 + 定价策略优化
result: 能源效率提升20%，成本降低15%
conclusion: DRL是需求响应优化的有效方法

title: DETR: End-to-End Object Detection with Transformers
summary: DETR presents an end-to-end object detection framework using transformers. By eliminating the need for hand-crafted components like NMS, DETR achieves competitive performance with simplified pipeline.
details: DETR提出了一个使用Transformer的端到端目标检测框架。通过消除NMS等手工组件的需求，DETR以简化的流程实现了有竞争力的性能。
motivation: 传统检测流程复杂，需要多个手工组件
method: Transformer + 二分图匹配损失
result: 在COCO上达到与Faster R-CNN相当的性能
conclusion: Transformer可用于端到端目标检测

code_info.description: DETR: End-to-End Object Detection with Transformers

title: Microgrid Energy Management with Federated Learning
summary: We propose a federated learning framework for microgrid energy management. By enabling collaborative learning across multiple microgrids while preserving data privacy, our method achieves superior energy optimization.
details: 我们提出了一个用于微电网能源管理的联邦学习框架。通过在多个微电网间实现协作学习同时保护数据隐私，我们的方法实现了卓越的能源优化。
motivation: 微电网数据隐私限制了协作学习
method: 联邦学习 + 能源管理优化
result: 能源效率提升18%，数据隐私得到保护
conclusion: 联邦学习是微电网管理的有效方法

code_info.description: Microgrid Energy Management with Federated Learning

title: ResNet: Deep Residual Learning for Image Recognition
summary: ResNet introduces residual learning to train very deep neural networks. With skip connections, ResNet achieves state-of-the-art performance on ImageNet and becomes a foundational architecture for computer vision.
details: ResNet引入残差学习来训练非常深的神经网络。通过跳跃连接，ResNet在ImageNet上实现了SOTA性能，并成为计算机视觉的基础架构。
motivation: 深度网络难以训练，存在退化问题
method: 残差学习 + 跳跃连接
result: ImageNet分类误差降低至3.57%
conclusion: 残差连接是训练深度网络的关键
